text: I feel exposed and confused, as if my intentions and actions are being misunderstood. The repetition of the question—"Do you know what I mean?"—echoes in my mind, creating a sense of discomfort. I am uncertain whether I am truly understood or if I am missing something fundamental. Surrounded by others, in this bright, open space, my awkwardness feels amplified. There is a longing for connection and clarity, both from myself and from those around me. I am reflecting on the difference between intention and perception, and what it means to be seen, or unseen, in these casual moments.
